heading: Omitted
label: 1200e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which authorized appropriations for relocation of the members of the Yankton Sioux Tribe, South Dakota, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act July 6, 1954, ch. 463, § 868 Stat. 453
